quicksight.dataset.ColumnGroups.Description: Groupings of columns that work together in certain Amazon QuickSight features. Currently, only geospatial hierarchy is supported.

quicksight.dataset.ColumnLevelPermission.Description: A set of one or more definitions of a ` ColumnLevelPermissionRule `.

quicksight.dataset.DataSetId.Description: An ID for the dataset that you want to create. This ID is unique per AWS Region for each AWS account.

quicksight.dataset.FieldFolders.Description: The folder that contains fields and nested subfolders for your dataset.

quicksight.dataset.ImportMode.Description: Indicates whether you want to import the data into SPICE.

quicksight.dataset.IngestionWaitPolicy.Description: The wait policy to use when creating or updating a Dataset. The default is to wait for SPICE ingestion to finish with timeout of 36 hours.

quicksight.dataset.LogicalTableMap.Description: Configures the combination and transformation of the data from the physical tables.

quicksight.dataset.Name.Description: The display name for the dataset.

quicksight.dataset.Permissions.Description: A list of resource permissions on the dataset.

quicksight.dataset.PhysicalTableMap.Description: Declares the physical tables that are available in the underlying data sources.

quicksight.dataset.RowLevelPermissionDat.Description: The row-level security configuration for the data that you want to create.

quicksight.dataset.Tags.Description: Contains a map of the key-value pairs for the resource tag or tags assigned to the dataset.
